title: echium latifolium
intro: Echium latifolium, also known as viper's bugloss, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echium latifolium include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Echium latifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
